# Chase Sapphire Preferred

## 📊 Rate Summary

- Base rate: 1x on all purchases
- Best categories: dining, streaming, online grocery at 3x; travel up to 5x

## 📈 Earning Categories

1. Dining — 3x, confirmed
2. Streaming — 3x, confirmed
3. Online grocery — 3x, confirmed
4. Travel via Chase — 5x, confirmed
5. Other travel — 2x, confirmed
6. All other — 1x, confirmed

## 🚫 Caps And Exclusions

- No annual cap on bonus categories
- Merchant coding may vary — some restaurants code as retail and miss the 3x bonus
- Grocery earning excludes in-store purchases (online only)

## 📋 Confidence Notes

- Fixture only. Not live card data.
